  "japanese": {
    "IsA": [
      "それはボードゲームです。",
      "それはクロスアンドサークルゲームです。"
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "それは4つのトークンを持っています。",
      "それはゲームボードを持っています。",
      "それは特殊カードを持っています。",
      "それはトランプを持っています。",
      "それはトークンを持っています。",
      "それはスタートエリアを持っています。",
      "それはカードの手札を持っています。",
      "それはスタートフィールドを持っています。",
      "それはサークルトラックを持っています。",
      "それは家を持っています。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それはプレイヤーがゲームボード上でトークンをレースすることによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それはすべてのトークンを最初に「ホーム」に持ち帰ることを目的とすることによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それはトランプを使用してプレイされることによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それはパチーシに似ていることによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それはJeu des petits chevauxに似ていることによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それはTUCに似ていることによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは各ラウンドの開始時にプレイヤーにカードが配られることによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それはトークンが同じフィールドに着地した場合、移動したトークンが休んでいるトークンを置き換えることによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それはプレイヤーがプレイ可能なカードを持っていない場合、手札全体を捨てなければならないことによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それはスターターカードが新しいトークンをスタートフィールドに移動させることを可能にすることによって特徴づけられます。"
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "それはゲームボード上でトークンをレースするために使用されます。",
      "それはすべてのトークンを最初にホームに持ち帰るために使用されます。",
      "それはボード上でトークンを移動するために使用されます。",
      "それは相手のトークンをキャプチャまたは交換するために使用されます。",
      "それはブロックを作成するために使用されます。",
      "それはトークンを前方に移動するために使用されます。",
      "それはトークンを後方に移動するために使用されます。",
      "それは家を上から下へと満たすために使用されます。",
      "それはパートナーのトークンをプレイするために使用されます。",
      "それはパートナーのトークンを移動させるのを助けるために使用されます。"
    ],
    "LocatedIn": [
      "それはゲームボード上にあります。"
    ],
    "BuiltIn": [

    ],
    "BuiltBy": [

    ],

IsA: It is a Cross and Circle game.

It has a game board.
It has specialty cards.

It has a starting field.

HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by players racing their tokens around the game board.

It is characterized by its similarity to Pachisi.
It is characterized by its similarity to Jeu des petits chevaux.
It is characterized by its similarity to TUC.
It is characterized by players being dealt cards at the beginning of each round.
It is characterized by a token replacing a resting one if it lands on the same field.
It is characterized by a player discarding their hand if they have no playable cards.
It is characterized by a starter card allowing a new token to move to the starting field.
UsedFor: It is used for racing tokens around the game board.
It is used for being the first to take all of one's tokens home.
It is used for moving tokens around the board.
It is used for capturing or swapping tokens.
It is used for creating blockades.
It is used for moving tokens forward.
It is used for moving tokens backward.
It is used for filling the house from the top down.
It is used for playing on partners tokens.
It is used for helping move partners tokens.
LocatedIn: It is located on a game board.
Affects: It affects other tokens on the board.
It affects the movement of tokens.
It affects the distribution of cards.
It affects the outcome of the game.
ConsistsOf: It consists of tokens.
It consists of a game board.
It consists of playing cards.
It consists of specialty cards.
It consists of a starting area.
It consists of a starting field.
It consists of a circle track.
It consists of a house.
It consists of golf tees.
It consists of cribbage pegs.
PartOf: It is part of the Cross and Circle game family.
It is part of the Pachisi game style.
It is part of the board game genre.
KnownFor: It is known for its similarity to Ludo.
It is known for its similarity to Aggravation.
It is known for its similarity to Sorry!.
It is known for its similarity to Pachisi.
It is known for its similarity to Jeu du Toc.
It is known for its similarity to Jeu des petits chevaux.
It is known for its similarity to TUK.
It is known for its similarity to TUC.
It is known for its card-based movement.
It is known for its variations.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Quebec.
It is associated with France.
It is associated with Vermont.
It is associated with Canada.
It is associated with Atlantic Canada.
It is associated with Alberta.
It is associated with early settlers.
It is associated with team play.
It is associated with card functions.
It is associated with variations like Saskatchewan and Cape Breton.
About: It is about a race around a game board.
It is about being the first to get all tokens home.
It is about strategic card play.
It is about capturing opponent tokens.
It is about creating blockades.
It is about variations in game rules.
It is about team play.
It is about different card functions.
It is about moving tokens forward and backward.
It is about the objective of completing the game.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by Pachisi.
It was influenced by Jeu des petits chevaux.
It was influenced by early settlers of Quebec.
It was influenced by French card games.
It was influenced by dice games.
It was influenced by board games.
It was influenced by Ludo.
It was influenced by Aggravation.
It was influenced by Sorry!.
It was influenced by TUK.
Influenced: It influenced the game Jeu du Toc.
It influenced the game Jeu des petits chevaux.
It influenced variations of the game.
It influenced team play in board games.
It influenced the design of Cross and Circle games.
